zh.Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾布藍斯頓
zh.Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾維洛賀比
zh.Pleasley, Derbyshire, England: 英國英格蘭德比夏爾普利亞斯利
zh.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover是Simon de PLEASLEY的兒子，於大約1142年出生在英國德比夏爾普利亞斯利。他於大約1167年與Matilda Unknown在英國英格蘭德比夏爾普利亞斯利結婚。他們至少是4個女兒的父母。他去世於1203年在英國德比夏爾阿福享年62歲，埋葬在英國諾廷加姆爾。

zh-hans.Branston, Lincolnshire, England, United: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾布藍斯頓
zh-hans.Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England: 英国英格兰林可爾史爾維洛賀比
zh-hans.Pleasley, Derbyshire, England: 英国英格兰德比夏爾普利亞斯利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover是Simon de PLEASLEY的儿子，于大约1142年出生在英国德比夏爾普利亞斯利。他于大约1167年与Matilda Unknown在英国英格兰德比夏爾普利亞斯利结婚。他们至少是4个女儿的父母。他去世于1203年在英国德比夏爾阿福享年62岁，埋葬在英国諾廷加姆爾。

nameMeanings.name: Pleasley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Peasley, a lost place in Hailes (Gloucestershire). The placename derives from Old English pise ‘pea’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: Serlo
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Mario, Arturo, Jesus, Luis, Raul, Adan, Adela, Agustin, Azucena, Baldemar, Dalila.  Italian Aldo, Angelo, Carlo, Santo, Vito, Antonio, Carmela, Elvio, Enrico, Franco, Grazia, Mauro.

Italian and Spanish: nickname from Italian and medieval Spanish merlo ‘blackbird’ (from Latin merula). In the Middle Ages this bird seems to have been regarded at times as foolish and gullible, and at other times as cunning and wily. In some cases the surname may have arisen as a metonymic occupational name for a bird catcher. See also Merle 1.

variants.name: Merola
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Carmine, Marco, Sal, Alfonse, Guido, Lorenzo, Pasquale, Salvatore, Antonio, Carlo, Fiore.
Italian (southern): nickname from Neapolitan merula ‘female blackbird’, from Latin merula (see Merlo ).

variants.name: Merli
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

variants.name: Merle
meanings: Probably a contracted form of Meriel , but also associated with the small class of girls' names derived from birds, since it is identical in form with Old French merle ‘blackbird’ (Latin merula). The name came to public notice in the 1930s with the actress Merle Oberon ( 1911–79 , born Estelle Merle O'Brien Thompson ).

variants.name: Merlos
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Fidel, Francisco, Jorge, Juan, Lazaro, Manuel, Miguel, Adelso, Alonso, Ana, Angel, Cesar.
Spanish and Portuguese: from the personal name Merlos (see Merlo ).

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover was born about 1142, in Pleasley, Derbyshire, England as the son of Simon de PLEASLEY. He married Matilda Unknown about 1167, in Pleasley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 daughters. He died in 1203, in Ashover, Derbyshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Nottinghamshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover est né environ 1142, à Pleasley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, fils de Simon de PLEASLEY. Il a épousé Matilda Unknown environ 1167, à Pleasley, Derbyshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1203, à Ashover, Derbyshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Nottinghamshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover wurde um 1142 in Pleasley, Derbyshire, England, als Sohn von Simon de PLEASLEY geboren. Er hat um 1167 in Pleasley, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom Matilda Unknown geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Töchter. Er starb 1203 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Ashover, Derbyshire, England und wurde in Nottinghamshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover è nato il circa 1142 nel Pleasley, Derbyshire, England come figlio di Simon de PLEASLEY. Lui sposato Matilda Unknown circa 1167, nel Pleasley, Derbyshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figlie. Morì nel 1203, nel Ashover, Derbyshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Nottinghamshire, England.

ja.Ashover, Derbyshire, England: イギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバー
ja.Nottinghamshire, England: イギリスノッティンガムシュアイア
ja.Willoughby, Lincolnshire, England: イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアウィロウビー
ja.Pleasley, Derbyshire, England: イギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアプレアスリー
ja.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashoverは約1142年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアプレアスリーでSimon de PLEASLEYの息子として生まれた。約1167年にイギリスイギリスデルブイシュアイアプレアスリーでMatilda Unknownと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の娘の親であった。彼は1203年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアアショバーで62歳で死去し，イギリスノッティンガムシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover(은)는 대략 1142년 영국 더비실르 플리슬리에서 Simon de PLEASLEY의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 대략 1167년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 플리슬리에서 Matilda Unknown(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1203년 영국 더비실르 애쇼버에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노틴그함실르에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover nasceu aproximadamente 1142, em Pleasley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra filho de Simon de PLEASLEY. Ele casou-se com Matilda Unknown aproximadamente 1167, em Pleasley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1203, em Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover родился около 1142 г. в местности плисли, дирбишир, Англия. Его отца звали Simon de PLEASLEY. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda Unknown около 1167 г. в местности плисли, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 дочери. Он умер в 1203 г. в местности ашовир, дирбишир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности ноттингхамшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Serlo III Pleasley ,of Ashover nació aproximadamente 1142, en Pleasley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Simon de PLEASLEY. Se casó con Matilda Unknown aproximadamente 1167, en Pleasley, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijas. Murió en 1203, en Ashover, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Nottinghamshire, Inglaterra.
